summary: Plan-only classification for five open PR inventory items. No GitHub mutations planned because closure/comment/label actions are blocked and merge preflight is incomplete for every PR; security-shaped guard/hash wording is treated under the hydrated artifact's central security assessment unless maintainers choose otherwise.

The code delta is small and checks look healthy, but the live label says waiting on author and required merge preflight proof is missing. Human/applicator follow-up is needed before merge.
